tasks.task: Updated trading_config.json to set trade_size_usd to 10.00.

Modified templates/index.html and static/script.js to include UI elements for managing and displaying trade size, and fetching/displaying detailed trade information (including buy/sell prices and timestamps).
Updated llm_strategy_generator.py to read trade_size_usd from trading_config.json for strategy generation.
Modified crypto_trading_llm.sh to dynamically load trade_size_usd from trading_config.json for real trades.
